mapper.sql: API_KEY_ID, USER_ID, API_KEY_NAME, API_KEY_PREFIX, API_KEY_HASH, API_KEY_STATUS, EXPIRE_TIME, LAST_USED_TIME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME
mapper.select: SELECT FROM SYS_USER_API_KEY WHERE API_KEY_PREFIX = #{apiKeyPrefix} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM SYS_USER_API_KEY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC
